name: Liquefy Token Guard
description: One-click token usage scan, waste audit, and budget guard for OpenClaw and other agent workspaces. Detects duplicate prompts, oversized context, and expensive-model overkill, then recommends concrete fixes.
author: Parad0x Labs

trace_dir.description: Directory containing agent traces or logs with token usage metadata

capsule_out_dir.description: Optional output directory or .json path for generated context capsules

workspace_dir.description: Workspace that should receive the primed next-run bootstrap files

auto_scan_on_status.description: Refresh token ledger from the trace directory before status/report commands

apply_budget_on_status.description: When true, status/recommend/daily_guard will persist the configured budget before reporting

scan_now.description: Scan the configured trace directory and update the token ledger

audit_now.description: Audit the configured trace directory for token waste

set_budget.description: Write/update token and cost budgets for the configured org

build_capsule.description: Build a compact context capsule from raw traces and emit a hard reduction number

prime_next_run.description: Build a context capsule and install the bootstrap into the target workspace for the next agent run

verify_capsule.description: Check whether the current workspace capsule is still fresh for the present trace set

scoreboard.description: Show replay-aware capsule savings history for the configured workspace

status.description: Combined scan, report, and audit summary

recommend.description: Generate concrete recommendations from current token waste findings

daily_guard.description: Run the full token guard cycle and emit a compact operator summary
Morning token waste and budget recap
